hero.subtitle: Klippr connects your favorite business with a unique, one-time QR code. Scan, save, and share your experience.
hero.ctaSecondary: Own a business? See how Klippr helps you →
hero.imageAlt: Klippr app — promotions feed with discounts

videos.heading: See Klippr in action
videos.subheading: Watch how the experience works for users and meet the people behind the platform.
videos.productDescription: A quick walkthrough of the Klippr experience: real discounts, unique QR codes, and secure in-store redemptions.
videos.teamDescription: Meet the team building Klippr and the vision behind a trusted promotions community.

painPoints.label: Before Klippr
painPoints.heading: You've been through this.
painPoints.bridge:
Klippr was born to
solve this.

items.label: Reused code
items.headline: You shared it.
items.copy: You shared a coupon, but when you tried to use it, it was already gone. Someone else took it.

items.label: Unverified offer
items.headline: You saw it online.
items.copy: You see a promo on social media but no one confirms if it actually works. Do you risk it?

items.label: Blind campaign
items.headline: You launched the promo.
items.copy: Your business runs promos but doesn't know how many customers used them or what they thought.

steps.label: EXPLORE
steps.heading:
Filter and
discover
steps.body: Open the feed and filter by category, location, rating, or discount percentage. Find the deal that actually works for you.

steps.label: ACTIVATE
steps.heading:
Your QR,
your discount
steps.body: Found something good. Tap "Get discount" and Klippr generates a unique QR linked to your account. Only you can use it — no one else.

steps.label: REDEEM
steps.heading:
Show it
and done
steps.body: At the store, show your QR. Instant validation, under 3 seconds. No paperwork, no screenshots, no hassle.

steps.label: SHARE
steps.heading:
Your voice
matters
steps.body: How did it go? Leave your rating. Your experience helps others decide and helps the business improve their promotions.

activar.validTime: Valid for 15 min · For you only

compartir.question: How was your experience at The Daily Grind?
compartir.review: Excellent coffee and service. The discount applied perfectly, no hassle. Would definitely go back! ☕

discounts.title: Specialty coffee
discounts.conditions: Menu specialty drinks only; cannot be combined with other promotions.

discounts.title: Pastry with your drink
discounts.conditions: The free pastry must be the same price or less than the drink.

discounts.title: Full breakfast
discounts.conditions: Includes main plate, muffin, and juice per breakfast menu.

discounts.title: Classic double
discounts.conditions: Second burger must be the same recipe; extras charged separately.

discounts.title: Burger + drink combo
discounts.conditions: Counter orders only; not valid for delivery or third-party apps.

discounts.title: Afternoon snack
discounts.conditions: Applies to snack-menu items; one redemption per ticket.

discounts.title: Chef’s premium roll
discounts.conditions: Minimum 2 premium rolls; tip not included in the discount.

discounts.title: Lunch set
discounts.conditions: Fixed lunch menu; fish swaps subject to chef’s availability.

discounts.title: Second bottle of sake
discounts.conditions: Applies to the lower-priced bottle; dine-in only.

benefits.heading: Made for you —
benefits.subheading: Klippr understands you're two people: one who wants to save and one who wants to grow.

b2c.title: Deals that actually matter
b2c.body: Filter by category, location, and rating. Your feed adapts to what you're looking for, with no noise or spam.

b2c.title: Your code, yours alone
b2c.body: Each QR is unique and one-time. It locks after redemption. No one else can use it. Period.

b2c.title: Reviews from people like you
b2c.body: Only those who actually redeemed can review. No made-up reviews.

b2c.title: Everything in one place
b2c.body: Your active discounts, past redemptions, and reviews. No searching through emails or screenshots.

b2b.title: Know what works (for real)
b2b.body: Dashboard with real data: how many saw your promo, how many redeemed it, how they rated it.

b2b.title: Goodbye to reuse
b2b.body: Each QR is automatically blocked post-redemption. No more shared coupons on WhatsApp eating into your margin.

b2b.title: You control everything
b2b.body: Publish, pause, or edit campaigns from the app. Set %, dates, conditions, and redemption limits. No middlemen.

b2b.title: Build visible trust
b2b.body: Your customers leave public reviews and you can reply to them. Social proof attracts new customers without spending on ads.

socialProof.heading: The numbers speak.
socialProof.stat1: more redemptions in campaigns with positive reviews
socialProof.stat2: QR validation at point of sale

testimonials.quote: I used to search for promos in WhatsApp groups and never knew if they'd work. With Klippr I scan my QR and done, zero surprises.
testimonials.name: Lizbeth

testimonials.quote: Now I know exactly how many customers used my Friday promo and what they thought. The metrics changed how I plan my campaigns.
testimonials.name: Alexander

testimonials.quote: The team learned to scan QR codes in 5 minutes. Zero complex training.
testimonials.name: Retail point of sale

comparison.heading: Why Klippr and not another app?
comparison.tooltipPartial: Usually applies only on delivery platforms, but not when redeeming in person.
